description_long: This object is a long, double-edged sword with a straight, metallic blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade is silvery-gray and appears to be made of polished steel, reflecting light along its length. The crossguard is black and extends horizontally, providing protection for the hand. The handle is cylindrical, wrapped in a vivid red material, and capped with a black pommel that matches the guard. The overall design is functional with a slight medieval or fantasy aesthetic, and there are no visible engravings or decorative elements. The sword is well-proportioned, suggesting it is intended for two-handed use.
description: A long, double-edged sword with a straight steel blade, black crossguard, and a red-wrapped handle with a black pommel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight blade, crossguard, and red handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, with minimal width visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blade and handle.
